problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: If Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
